params.name: Artificial Blackhole
params.source: Wish Box, Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.07%), Demon Chest (0.1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Nebula Chest (0.01%)
params.description:
On Jul 22, 1980 AD, the Large Hadron Collider was made, which can produce artificial Blackholes.

The artificial blackhole is a concept based on the phenomenon that blackholes can devour everything, including light. If the velocity of a fluid can be made to exceed the speed of sound, then an artificial blackhole can be built inside the liquid. Other than sound, it cannot absorb the surroundings like a real blackhole.

[Basic info]

Name: Artificial Black hole.

Function: Devours everything, incl …
